payload.answer: I concluded that Brain is the core memory system with Cognee as a rebuildable projection derived from Brain. The records include Slack-based intake, family facts, and Sam's preferences as contextual data. Details remain subject to source truth and future updates; no irreversible or superseded conclusions were stated beyond this relational understanding.
payload.decision: provide_summary of conclusions about Brain and Cognee based on records, preserving ambiguity and avoiding superseded facts

entity_resolution.reason: No unique, persistent identifiers explicitly provided for Brain or Cognee beyond their relational descriptions in the records; resolution kept abstract to avoid misassociation.

memory_cards.statement: Brain is a personal memory system with a source-of-truth record (Brain DB) and a Cognee rebuildable projection; Slack strict intake, family facts, and Sam preferences are also part of records.

repair_options: Obtain explicit identifiers for Brain and Cognee to resolve entity mapping
Versioned records to track superseded conclusions
Audit trail for Slack intake and family facts changes
Capture definitive statements about permanence of conclusions
